notes: SHIP v1.14.276 - WORK GRID CARDS: wire BURNDOWN + AUDITS (per HANDOFF-WORK-GRID-CARDS-276.md; owner reversed the .275 leave-dormant ruling in chat: "wire them, i changed my mind"). SURGICAL ADDITIVE: two .rf-card divs cloned from the BOM pattern, appended after RACK MAP in the WORK tool grid (:12677). No logic, no assets (both webps already precached at sw.js :92/:93), no table-row changes, no deploy-detail-button changes. The .275 art (audits+burndown re-arted to the clean machined-frame no-text style) was cached but rendered on NO surface - DEPLOY_TOOLS.img was dead data, the visible grid excluded these two, and their only home was a ~13px deploy-detail SVG-glyph button. This ship gives them a visible home. Both now grep at 2 refs (table row + card = art renders); the other two dark rows (sops, blast) left as-is pending a separate ruling (Open Item 1); #ff8a00 audits accent carried forward verbatim, outside the token set, flagged not changed (Open Item 2). VERIFIED LIVE (display path, not deploy path, per the .275 lesson): both cards render with images actually DECODED (complete=true, naturalWidth=256, box 230x230 - not broken refs); BURNDOWN = fibre bundle, AUDITS = clipboard+magnifier, machined frame, sitting after PORT MAP/RACK MAP; both OPEN their tool on tap (currentOpsTab=burndown/audits, host populated, NO Unknown-tool toast - confirmed OPS_TABS has both keys :19785/:19789 so rd_openOpsTool resolves); grid 4->6 tool cards reflows with NO horizontal overflow (RULE1 pass; forced to 360px it wraps to a responsive 4-col grid, no overflow). ?legacy=1 unaffected: the cards exist in the DOM like their BOM siblings but the rd WORK grid is not a legacy surface (offsetParent null, 0x0). DOC: INTEGRATION-STATE §56 updated IN THIS SHIP - marked superseded, do-not-wire marker retired, finding+lesson retained (standing rule: an edit that invalidates a prior doc entry corrects it in the same commit). Gates: node --check 4/0; CSS 12 balanced; CRLF uniform; three-stamp .275->.276. [3] the existing four cards did not shift/reflow badly at 6 cards - check the wrap at phone width. [4] hard-refresh/SW-update so the new HTML loads.
